chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 2125 of 2017 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 25.01.2018 For orders on office objection For katcha peshi Mr. Riaz Ahmed Mallah, advocate holding brief for Mr. Karim Bux Rind, advocate for petitioner Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, Asstt: A.G. Learned counsel holding brief for counsel for petitioner states that he will be satisfied if learned A.A.G. gives undertaking that the official respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioner and shall act strictly in accordance with law. Learned A.A.G. files comments on behalf of official respondents and gives such undertaking that the official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law and shall provide protection to the petitioner which is available to other citizens of this country. Learned counsel holding brief being satisfied with the undertaking does not press this petition any further which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
